features.featureTitle: In `frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx`, completely remove all authentication checks, login gates, and any conditional rendering that blocks or restricts access to the /admin route. The page must render immediately on load without requiring Internet Identity login or any identity verification. Remove all references to `useInternetIdentity`, `isAuthenticated`, or any auth state that gates the display of content. Ensure `useGetAllSubmissions` is called unconditionally on mount and submissions are displayed as soon as the query resolves.
